query: UPDATE legal_pages SET content = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(content, 'EDITPDF.ONLINE', 'PDFUp'), 'editPDF.online', 'pdfup.io'), 'editpdf.online', 'pdfup.io'), 'editPDF', 'PDFUp'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE slug IN ('terms', 'privacy', 'cookies', 'legal', 'gdpr');
